instructions: (Claude Code's built-in system prompt; see --bare mode docs)

queries.user_text:
You're debugging a real-codebase bug in `cpp_peglib-3` (project `cpp_peglib`, an open-source C/C++ project from the BugsC++ corpus).

The buggy source tree is on the host at `/Users/ibraheemamin/projects/COS484/chatdbgpro/data/workspaces/cpp_peglib-3/cpp_peglib/buggy-3` and is also mounted at `/work` inside a Linux/amd64 container named `bench-t4-06a9ef35c56a47c28119` (gdb, the buggy binary, and all build deps live in that container; the binary is NOT runnable on this host directly).

Buggy binary inside the container: `/work/build/test/test-main`
Failing test invocation:           `./build/test/test-main  Custom AST testr`
Observed behavior:                  `exit_code:0`
Bug type:                          `memory_error`
Language:                          `cpp`

How to investigate
------------------
* To READ source code, use Read / Grep / your normal tools — the source tree is at `/Users/ibraheemamin/projects/COS484/chatdbgpro/data/workspaces/cpp_peglib-3/cpp_peglib/buggy-3` (it's been added via `--add-dir`).
* To RUN the binary, run gdb, or execute anything else inside the build environment, use Bash with this template:

      docker exec -i -w /work bench-t4-06a9ef35c56a47c28119 bash -c '<cmd>'

  e.g.
      docker exec -w /work bench-t4-06a9ef35c56a47c28119 bash -c 'ls -la'
      docker exec -w /work bench-t4-06a9ef35c56a47c28119 bash -c 'gdb -batch -ex run -ex bt --args ./build/test/test-main  Custom AST testr'

  The container is dedicated to this case; it'll be torn down when this session ends, so don't worry about cleanup.

Final answer
------------
Identify the root cause in the source, propose both a local fix and a structural global fix.

Your final response MUST include three labelled paragraphs:

  ROOT CAUSE: <file:line and what is wrong>
  LOCAL FIX:  <minimal code change>
  GLOBAL FIX: <structural change preventing this CLASS of bug>

Do NOT modify the source files on disk. Just investigate and produce the diagnosis as your final assistant message.

tool_calls.call: docker exec -w /work bench-t4-06a9ef35c56a47c28119 bash -c 'gdb -batch -ex "set pagination off" -ex run -ex bt -ex "frame 0" --args ./build/test/test-main "Custom AST testr" 2>&1 | tail -60'
docker exec -w /work bench-t4-06a9ef35c56a47c28119 bash -c './build/test/test-main "Custom AST testr" 2>&1; echo "exit: $?"'
docker exec -w /work bench-t4-06a9ef35c56a47c28119 bash -c './build/test/test-main "Custom AST test" 2>&1; echo "exit: $?"'
docker exec -w /work bench-t4-06a9ef35c56a47c28119 bash -c 'grep -n "Custom AST" test/test1.cc | head -20'
